results.name: card advantage
results.description: Things that give you access to more cards.  (The technical meaning of card advantage can be much broader than this, but this is what we're using here.)

results.name: card art
results.description: Magic cards depicting the art of other magic cards

results.name: card "damage"
results.description: Art that look as if the card itself was damaged in some way.

results.name: card game reference
results.description: A series of cards in Mystery Booster 2 that reference other card games.

results.name: card names
results.description: A collection of tags identifying properties and naming schemes in cards.

results.name: cards in exile matter
results.description: Mechanics that care about the cards in the exile zone.

results.name: cards in graveyard matter
results.description: Mechanics that care about the cards in one or more graveyards.

results.name: card style matters
results.description: Foiling, alt art, etc matters.

results.name: castable from exile
results.description: Cards you can cast or access from exile.

results.name: castable from graveyard
results.description: Cards you can cast or access from the graveyard.

results.name: castable from library
results.description: Cards you can cast or access from your library.

results.name: casting restriction
results.description: Spells with unusual conditions restricting their casting.

results.name: cast on resolution
results.description: Spells and abilities that let you cast spells as part of their resolution.

results.name: cast tax
results.description: When a spell is cast, something happens unless the player casting the spell pays a cost, usually mana.

results.name: cast trigger-self
results.description: Cards that have a trigger when they are cast

results.name: catalog
results.description: Draw two cards, then discard a card.

results.name: catch-22
results.description: At the end of turn, if a condition isn't met, a consequence is given.

results.name: catch up
results.description: Players who have less get more.

results.name: cat eye
results.description: Eyes with slit pupils, such as the ones cats have.

results.name: cat person
results.description: A person who is a cat, not someone who is into cats. Contains in and out of MtG universe depictions.

results.name: cat rakshasa
results.description: Artwork of cat rakshasas, as depicted in early Khans of Tarkir. This variety of Rakshasas is now deprecated from Magic.
